title: crataegus russanovii f. latifolia
intro: Crataegus russanovii f. latifolia is a variant of the Crataegus russanovii plant, which is a species of hawthorn tree native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs). The health benefits of Crataegus russanovii f. latifolia include reduced blood pressure, improved circulation, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart-related issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves, flowers, and fruits of the Crataegus russanovii f. latifolia plant are typically used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
